summary: Comprehensive forensic analysis of Wincham's exorbitant £9,600 fee charged to Los Romeros Limited for the Lanzarote property sale at €315,000. Synthesises evidence from three NotebookLM notebooks: Invoices, Spanish Property Sale, and Agreements & Contracts. Documents exact fee breakdown, market rate comparisons, percentage markups, contractual inclusions/exclusions, billing irregularities, and actionable legal/financial recommendations.
